steps.command: wp eval '$content = base64_decode(""); $post_data = array("post_title" => "Home", "post_content" => $content, "post_status" => "publish", "post_type" => "page", "meta_input" => array("_wp_page_template" => "page-no-title")); $post_id = wp_insert_post($post_data); if (is_wp_error($post_id)) { echo "Error: " . $post_id->get_error_message(); } else { echo "Created page ID: " . $post_id; }'

wp eval '$page = get_page_by_title("Home", OBJECT, "page"); if ($page) { update_option("show_on_front", "page"); update_option("page_on_front", $page->ID); echo "Homepage set to page ID: " . $page->ID; } else { echo "Page not found: Home"; }'
